I highly recommend Rick and RMG.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nassali Summer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXRnHFHoN_pMh0ASpYmjeplqBoE-VwVCrh-ekw-IHoGkPLw5_Au=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"RMG roofing came to my home and provided a written estimate.  When the work was agreed on I paid a 50% deposit via e transfer for materials and we set the date to commence work.  On the scheduled day RMG did not arrive as promised.  When we called the owner of RMG he refused to acknowledge the deposit, do the work, provide us with materials or give a refund. We lost the full deposit to him.   We called the RCMP to file a complaint and they let us know this individual is very well know to them.  They advised a civil suit or a class action suit, as many people have been victimized.  We are proceeding with small claims court, but in the intern I can't afford to repair my roof.  I am on a very limited income and now have to go through the winter with a leaking roof.  Research this company....I should have looked more deeply and have learned a hard lesson as a result....I hope no one else will.  Call a contractor, or anyone in the local home industry and inquire about RMG.  Google the owner's name or call your local police  and that should be enough to convince you.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Doreen Adair","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJMuIV6MlVXalwMXM3SSKitKbf9sIvsiXy6knX0GPmgvISAtA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Just got my roof done by these guys. I would definitely recommend them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lennie Mckim","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLsvftm-mCrhSFjplvfoN2Hi028uvsBaCpU5f8teJmRiUsfRQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"A "No-Show"!  My next-day call to inquire why "scheduled" appointment failed, obviously collided with a vacant mind. With vague, if any, excuse for failed appointment, the individual was rude, impatient and grossly interruptive. Therefore, being told, "I'm on a job. I don't have time to listen to this!!", initiated "Over and Out"!  Zero stars would more than suffice any recommendation to RMG's so-called NON-SERVICE!!","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"A Google User","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/default-user=s120-c-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"EDIT - Review updated 12/24

Despite my initial impressions of John and his team doing a great job on my roof - he has completely dropped the ball on a pretty major issue that had my roof torn / shorn by snow fall due to his installing part of the roof differently to the one he replaced.

I chased and chased and chased and he always said he'd get around to it, but never did - despite my willingness to pay for the additional work to fix it up and get it sorted.

I am now working with another contractor to get the issue resolved, and will not be working with Invision again and cannot in good faith recommend them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michelle Troughton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUZGGyMHOeizYwh5f_mXHWEXgWj-nRCHl__QQbSFdAA8WA1YiMq=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I highly recommend John and his crew. They started the roofing project on time, actually two days early, and they finished early. It wasn't the easiest of projects but the roof looks amazing and the clean up was excellent. The crew was very professional, friendly and efficient. And to our pleasant surprise, the final invoice was exactly what he quoted us..which was a very reasonable price. We would recommend Invision Contracting to anyone looking for a roofing company.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rob Selmanovic","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKCg0HXUfeDOH-NIv8Z6_PYOWNgWg3-_232aiTcau3HejZi_g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I called Mike to get a quote on my leaking roof. He told me he’d come and take a look in the next few days. That never happened. I called him back to reschedule. He told me he could be there around noon. He never showed and didn’t contact me. I tried calling and texting again and was ignored. I tried again another morning. He did pick up the phone and told me he’d have to call me back in 10 minutes. I have not heard from him since. He lied. Very unprofessional. Unreliable. Complete lack of respect for a client in need. I would not trust this guy.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marlise Boucher","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVTcRHMwk88kFJkUHj3iDqaUGc4_927DVvtWnaQawNkb9127o8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I can't say enough good things about my experience with Invision General Contracting! From start to finish, they were professional, responsive, and truly went above and beyond.
The team showed up on time, explained every step of the process, and completed the work ahead of schedule. Not only was the craftsmanship top-notch, but they also left the property spotless — you wouldn’t even know they were there, aside from the beautiful new roof!
What impressed me most was their attention to detail and commitment to quality. They used high-grade materials and even fixed a few hidden issues without adding extra charges. That kind of integrity is rare.
If you're looking for a reliable, honest, and highly skilled roofing contractor, look no further than Invision General Contracting. I highly recommend them and will definitely be using them again for future projects.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michelle Pierce","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXsBlcVO89yjKQG8K-6ZtNgp3-bwb_KQM0wRCstVFMJL700wsFv=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"As a single family income earner the idea of a roof was daunting and overwhelming, Invision General Contracting was so nice to deal with. Clear communication, reasonable rates, an efficient workers. The job was completed in two days and the clean up was impressive. I would highly recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Daniele Doobenen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKRhVihw-6CHQaCFnMrVqr_idLbljHRu2JMKQHYPCsxj5S5=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This crew was the best I've worked with. The estimate was prompt and they stuck to  the price, even when I waited a year to do the job. Their verbal and written communication is excellent, they keep their promises (gave me a video & pics of the whole job) the work quality is impeccable. My friends say my 20yr old house looks like new! The entire crew showed up everyday until the job was done, no leaving to do other jobs or estimates for other customers. They were cheerful, and enthusiastic while working together to get the job done on time. They also upgraded my outbuilding, which now looks just as good as the house! I will hire them again for my next project. Can't go wrong with these guys!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Curtis Yost","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJaq004l_E_yslN63OiV1zPTrJMXtFQB1elyYjghtBTSh6fW6m0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had Invision replace my metal roof.  They were able to come and give me a quote and kept up good communication throughout the whole process.
They were able to replace my whole roof in a day!  They even came back to tidy up a couple things that I had concerns about

Overall happy with my experience with John and his crew as well as my communications with Kalin.

One note I would make would be to improve housekeeping and clean up once the job is done or as it's ongoing.  I had to pickup probably over 100 screws or nails in the yard where my toddler plays.  Hard to fault them too much as they finished my roof in a day and it was a hot one.

Thanks guys!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Stephanie Grant","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLUuKZvw_icPmIEhb-qUnKRIsG6tesr_NQ4afRnRGL2K1hLXQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We got referred to Johns company through family. They were super pleased with the quality and pricing of their new roof. I reached out to John in the middle of selling our home for a roof quote. He answered promptly and gave me a quote with in an hour. I could tell he is kind and professional. We will gladly use his company again and happy to refer friends and family.","Images":null,"When":""}]
